title: access
description: Unwraps a MaybeAccessor. Calls it if it's a function, returns it directly otherwise.
param_value_desc: A value or an accessor function.
usage_unwrapping: The site publisher's <0>SiteObject</0> accepts <1>bucket</1> and <2>entry</2> as <3>MaybeAccessor</3>, so callers can pass either a plain value or a getter. The handler's reactive props object calls access on each one, resolving whichever form arrived into the concrete value the upload needs.
in_the_wild: See each file resolve its bucket and entry before uploading in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
